properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 28/16
ANDOEYA TEST CENTER WILL CONDUCT TESTING AND EXERCISE WITH MILITARY SYSTEMS DAILY BETWEEN 1100 AND 2200 UTC FROM 18 APR TO 29 APR.
SEAGOING TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING TWO HAZARD AREAS.
AREA 1: 
1. 69-18.4N 15-52.0E
2. 69-25.5N 14-56.4E
3. 70-13.1N 12-41.7E
4. 70-46.6N 15-45.3E
5. 69-53.6N 16-40.3E
6. 69-28.8N 16-43.2E

AREA 2:
1. 69-31.4N 15-38.8E
2. 69-15.7N 16-27.1E
3. 69-31.5N 17-14.3E
4. 69-39.7N 16-42.0E
5. 69-39.7N 16-12.9E

REEFERS TO NORWEGIAN NOTICE TO MARINERS 07/16
